docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-25-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3000 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 10 PAYMENTS OF $300 MONTH. PAYMENT ARE TO BE MADE ON THE 15TH OF THE MONTH, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF JAN-15-2023. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 25TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-22-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA MARIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NELLIE BRENNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3000 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 10 PAYMENTS OF $300 MONTH. THE FIRST PAYMENT TO BE MADE ON APRIL 15TH AND EVERY 15TH OF THE MONTH THEREAFTER, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF JAN-15-2023. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APR-22-22 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 4/8/22. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO NELLIE BRENNER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-26-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. **FINAL CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT** PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT 3-30-2022 IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3000 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 10 PAYMENTS OF $300 MONTH. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE ON THE 15TH OF THE MONTH, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF JAN-15-2023. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN-26-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 5/3/22. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO NELLIE BRENNER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-26-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3000 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 10 PAYMENTS OF $300 MONTH. PAYMENT ARE TO BE MADE ON THE 15TH OF THE MONTH, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF JAN-15-2023. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT 26TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY MARIN, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNER, NELLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR OCT-26-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - NELLIE BRENNER. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
